'''Telsij Cayr''' was a blonde, blue-eyed [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who became a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] pilot for the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] shortly before the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]].

==Biography==
The battle at [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] was her first battle, and she held the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], serving in [[Aggressor Wing]] where she was the pilot for [[Aggressor Seven]] with [[Kin Kian (Sullustan)|Kin Kian]].

During the battle she was shot down by [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]], and lost her left eye and left leg, which were replaced with prosthetics. Despite that, she eventually made her peace with Fel.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 23|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 23]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]]
